description: Promoted to varsity after the first meet of freshman year Cross Country season
Qualified and competed in the KHSAA State Championship in the 4x800 relay, freshman year Outdoor Track season
Named Team MVP for the freshman year Outdoor Track season

awardName: Kentucky All-State Cross Country, Third Team & All-Sophomore Team
description: Named to the 2025 Kentucky All-State cross country Girls Third Team and All-Sophomore Team
Qualified for the KHSAA State Championship in both the 4x800 relay and the 1600m run, sophomore year Outdoor Track season

awardName: Kentucky All-State Track & Field, Second Team
description: Selected to the 2026 Kentucky All-State second team in the 1600 Meter Run

awardName: Kentucky All-State Track & Field, All-Sophomore Team
description: Selected to the 2026 Kentucky All-State sophomore team in the 1600 Meter Run
Named Team MVP for the sophomore year Outdoor Track season, her second consecutive MVP honor
